title: Performance
description: The system MUST respond to user input within 2 seconds.

title: Reliability
description: The system SHALL be available 99.9% of the time.

title: Security
description: The system MUST protect user data from unauthorized access.

title: Privacy
description: The system SHALL ensure that user data is not shared without consent.

title: Scalability
description: The system SHOULD be able to handle 1000 concurrent users.

title: Usability
description: The system MUST be easy to use and navigate.

title: Maintainability
description: The system SHOULD be easy to modify and update.

title: Compatibility
description: The system MUST be compatible with major web browsers.

title: Integration
description: The system SHOULD integrate with other HR systems.
